component.name: DAoC Log Watcher
component.summary: Dark Age of Camelot realm points and kill tracker

description.p: DAoC Log Watcher is a real-time tracker for Dark Age of Camelot (Eden server). It reads your chat log as you play and gives you live statistics without any manual refreshing.

ul.li: Realm point breakdown by source: Player Kills, Campaign Quests, Battle Ticks, Siege, Assault Orders, Support Activity, Relic Captures, and Timed Missions
Rolling RP/h meter updated every 5 seconds
Character detection via the /stats command — automatically identifies your active character and tracks kills, deaths, and K/D ratio
Cumulative RP and rolling RP/h charts
Configurable time filters: All time, preset windows from 1 hour to 1 week, or a custom duration in hours and minutes
Screenshot to clipboard with one click

description.p: See the full changelog on GitHub.
